description_long: This is a squat, wide-bodied teapot with a short, narrow neck and a single spout extending from the side. The surface is matte white and adorned with hand-painted floral motifs in vibrant colors, including blue, red, yellow, and green, primarily concentrated on the upper body and around the spout. The spout is short and slightly angled, seamlessly integrated into the body. There is no visible handle, giving the teapot a unique, minimalist silhouette. The opening at the top is circular and appears to lack a lid, exposing the interior. The overall design suggests a decorative as well as functional purpose, with a traditional yet artistic aesthetic.
description: A wide, matte white teapot with colorful floral patterns, a short spout, and no visible handle or lid. Its body is decorated with hand-painted flowers, giving it a traditional and artistic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat body, narrow neck, and floral patterns on both sides, with the spout not visible.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the short, slightly upward-angled spout on the right and a dense cluster of floral decorations near the spout.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the spout's attachment to the body and shows floral patterns wrapping around the sides, with the neck and opening clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view displays a smaller cluster of floral patterns and the spout extending from the left, with the neck and opening prominent.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, straight spout angled slightly upward, positioned on the side of the body.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Hand-painted floral patterns in blue, red, yellow, green, and brown, located on the upper body and around the spout.
